mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (name, sort, type, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{name}, #{sort}, #{type}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update category
name = #{name},
sort = #{sort},
type = #{type},
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select * from category
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and type = #{type}
order by sort asc, create_time desc
